system: You are a helpful coding assistant. You help developers write clean, efficient code.

messages.content: Can you help me write a function to sort an array?

content.text:
Sure! Here's a quicksort implementation:

```python
def quicksort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    middle = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quicksort(left) + middle + quicksort(right)
```

This has O(n log n) average time complexity.
